_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Mahagun Moderne
project.address: Plot No. GH-02, Sector 78, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.tagline: A Harmonious Blend of Space, Luxury, and Life
project.description: Mahagun Moderne is an expansive, highly successful ready-to-move gated township in Central Noida, Sector 78, featuring 80% open spaces and excellent metro connectivity.
project.long_description: Mahagun Moderne stands as a premium landmark residential township in Sector 78, Noida. Spanning over a massive 25 acres, the project houses 2,650 units across 17 high-rise towers rising up to 21 and 25 floors. Thoughtfully planned with 80% open area, it offers a vibrant community living experience with world-class clubhouse amenities, beautiful themed parks, and specialized residential configurations ranging from 2 BHK to 5 BHK penthouses. Built with robust GFRG and conventional RCC structures, it is certified for structural durability and seismic resistance. Strategically situated within a 5-minute walk of the Sector 76 Aqua Line Metro Station, the development provides seamless daily transit, proximity to established schools, top healthcare complexes (such as Medanta and Neo Hospital), and prominent high-street commercial hubs like Spectrum Metro Mall.
project.design_theme: Modern Contemporary Architecture with Expansive Green Belts
marketing_claims: 80% Lush Open Spaces and Landscaped Gardens
Double-Height Lobbies and Laminated Wooden Bedroom Flooring
State-of-the-Art Clubhouse with Swimming Pool and Sports Courts
Vastu-Compliant and Highly Ventilated Corner Layouts
High-Rent Yield and Strong Capital Appreciation Track Record
ai_search_keywords: 3 BHK ready to move Noida Sector 78
project.project_risk_flag: None: Fully delivered, highly occupied, active legal title, and hassle-free bi-partite registries.

builder.name: Mahagun Group
builder.company_overview: Mahagun Group is a multi-billion real estate conglomerate operating in residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors across Delhi-NCR. Synonymous with timely delivery and transparency, the group has delivered over 15.76 million sq ft of landmark structures, housing over 11,500 happy families. With massive township-format portfolios under construction, they are highly regarded as one of Noida's most reliable and financially stable development houses.
awards: Best Premium Housing Project of the Year 2021
Most Trusted Brand in Real Estate (NCR) - Times Realty 2023

unit_types.name: 2 BHK (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 BHK overlooking central landscaping
unit_types.description: A well-allocated, cozy 2 BHK unit with modern layout. Bedrooms feature vitrified floor tiling, while balconies open directly to scenic landscaped views.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Elite)
unit_types.subtitle: Expansive 3 BHK layout with standard double-open balconies
unit_types.description: Features an elegant layout optimized for families requiring ventilation and sunlight. Balconies connect the living room and bedrooms flawlessly.
whats_included: Laminated wooden floor finish in master bedroom
Italian marble cladding accents in living room

unit_types.name: 4 BHK Verona Grande
unit_types.subtitle: Verona Flagship 4 BHK with private dressing suite and servant unit
unit_types.description: Stately luxury residence. Features large formal living and dining salons, direct high-speed lift access, walk-in closets, and attached servant utilities.
whats_included: Premium Italian floor marble in family lounges
Customized modular setup with chimney and hob
Smart lock and key secure door hardware

assumptions: All pricing models represent standard resale market transactions as of Q3 2026.
GST is 0% because the society has received full Occupancy Certificate (OC) from Noida Authority.
Registries are highly active and processed via tripartite standard procedures.

payment_plan.notes: Requires standard 10% booking token, 20% on agreement, and balance 70% at registry execution.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Mahagun Moderne is the gold standard for secure, high-density residential community living in Central Noida, blending prime metro proximity with top-tier structure standards.
why_buy: Outstanding Transit Linkages: Only a 500m walk from Sector 76 metro station, saving hours of NCR travel.
Zero Structural Risks: Fully completed, inhabited by over 2,400 families, with active bi-partite registrations.
Meticulous Spatial Layouts: Spans 25 acres with 80% open spaces, preventing any claustrophobic high-rise feelings.
why_avoid: Highly Dense: Housing over 2,600 units means peak-hour gym and pool facilities can get extremely crowded.
High Maintenance Dues: Retaining 80% green landscapes incurs substantial monthly upkeep charges.
decision_profile.best_for: Noida corporate professionals, multi-generation families requiring immediate transit-rich locations, and premium upgraders.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term investors seeking high-delta development returns.

buyerPersonas.headline: Prime Upgraded Central Address
reasons: Ready to move instantly, zero construction delays, active registration pools.
Excellent CBSE school and state-of-the-art hospitals inside a 3km radius.

buyerPersonas.headline: Effortless Metro Commuting
reasons: 5-minute walk to Aqua Line station, connecting to main Noida Expressway hubs.

riskRadar.description: Fully complete and occupied. Zero developmental risk.
Active registries under Noida Authority with zero title blocks.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent capital growth due to micro-market maturity.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly sought-after address for corporate tech executives, commanding robust rent levels.
investment_insights.market_desc: High demand for completed, registry-cleared layouts in Sector 78.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Extremely active resale pool ensures quick exits in 30 days.

location_highlights.title: Metro Proximity
location_highlights.description: Quick Aqua Line metro access at doorstep.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Transit Oriented Layout
neighborhood_advantages.description: Perfect central location connected to Dadri road.

persona_descriptions.FAMILY: Nuclear families seeking to live immediately in an active, secure community with children play yards and direct metro access.
persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Families moving from old, congested sectors of Noida (e.g. Sector 12/22/34) to enjoy rich, landscaped community greens.

persona_profile.motivation_note: A secure, mature ready-to-move ecosystem with flawless legal title and hassle-free registries.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Mahagun Moderne is a highly robust, secure buy in Sector 78 Noida. It combines exceptional transit connectivity with zero structural or title risks.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Perfect for end-users seeking absolute convenience. Walk to the metro, access schools within minutes, and enjoy an active community lifestyle immediately.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Solid wealth preservation asset. Rental yields are high (3.8-4.2%), and capital values remain highly resilient.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Extensive children parks, high security, and prominent educational institutions make it extremely safe for nuclear families.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Commanding high rental demand from corporate executives. Steady 10% capital appreciation expected.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Elegant structure finishes, grand lobbies, and premium wooden laminate bedrooms, though density limits ultra-luxury exclusivity.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero delivery or delivery delay risk. Clean title, active registries, and clear Noida Authority accounts.
walk_away_conditions: Strict preference for low-density luxury (project has 2,650 units).
negotiation_leverage: Use massive ready resale pools to pit multiple sellers against each other.
Negotiate hard on specific tower-rise PLCs.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect ready status. Act now if a registered corner unit is available below ₹11,500/sqft.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Highly stable developer. Tripartite deeds executed swiftly.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Complete safety of legal title. Active registrations vs complete registry freeze and recovery certificates at Antriksh.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Antriksh offers larger flat sizes at highly depressed, cheaper per-sqft entry rates.
competitors.verdict: Mahagun Moderne is the clear winner for safety, community build quality, and value-for-money. Avoid Antriksh unless cash purchase with extreme risk tolerance.
competitors.price_delta_note: Mahagun Moderne is approx. Rs 2,000/sqft more expensive but offers complete legal title security.
